evidence.observed: high step budget, loop guard off, no cache

findings.root_cause: Too many agent steps and repeated calls make the long tail slow.
findings.suggested_fix: Use lower max_steps, loop_guard, tool_budget and cache.

evidence.observed: verbose_system true, large context, large completion cap

findings.root_cause: Original config spends extra tokens on context and long answers.
findings.suggested_fix: Use compact prompt, smaller context, shorter completion cap and cache.

findings.root_cause: The answer can repeat user contact details.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii and redact answer text in wrapper.

evidence.metric: recomputed total compared with final answer line
evidence.observed: baseline temperature high and formula absent

findings.root_cause: The model may estimate instead of computing exactly.
findings.suggested_fix: Lower temperature, enable verify and specify the formula in prompt.

findings.root_cause: The agent can call the same tool more than needed.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget and require each tool at most once.

evidence.metric: total produced when product data is unavailable
evidence.observed: baseline prompt asks for a total without grounding

findings.root_cause: The model may produce a total without valid tool data.
findings.suggested_fix: Require tool-grounded answers and no total when unavailable.
